title: Video Captures Apparent Strike Near Boys’ School in Iran
summary_full: A communications tower seemed to be the intended target, according to satellite imagery analysis. Iranian state media reported that a boy had been killed in the explosion.
summary_public: A communications tower seemed to be the intended target, according to satellite imagery analysis. Iranian state media reported that a boy had been killed in the explosion.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian state media reported that a boy had been killed in the explosion.
